title: ✨ Rich Content Test: Mermaid, KaTeX & More
content:
# Rich Content Rendering Test

## 1. Mermaid Diagrams 📊

Here is a flow chart rendered using Mermaid:

```mermaid
graph TD
    A[Start] --> B{Is it working?}
    B -- Yes --> C[Great!]
    B -- No --> D[Fix it]
    C --> E[Deploy]
    D --> B
```

And a sequence diagram:

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    participant User
    participant System
    User->>System: Request Page
    System-->>User: Return HTML
    User->>System: Like Post
    System-->>User: Confetti! 🎉
```

## 2. LaTeX Math via KaTeX ➗

**Inline Math:**
The mass-energy equivalence is described by $E = mc^2$.
The solution to $ax^2 + bx + c = 0$ is $x = \frac{-b \pm \sqrt{b^2-4ac}}{2a}$.

**Block Math:**
Here is a summation formula:

$$
\sum_{i=1}^{n} i = \frac{n(n+1)}{2}
$$

And a matrix:

$$
\begin{pmatrix}
a & b \\
c & d
\end{pmatrix}
$$

## 3. Image Lightbox & Zoom 🔍

Click the images below to test the lightbox zoom effect.

![Scenery](https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1506744038136-46273834b3fb?ixlib=rb-4.0.3&auto=format&fit=crop&w=1600&q=80)
*Above: A beautiful landscape from Unsplash.*

## 4. Typography & Layout 📝

This is a standard paragraph to test the `prose-lg` typography settings. The line height should be comfortable, and the width constrained for optimal readability using the new `max-w-6xl` layout.

> This is a blockquote to test the citation styling. It should look clean and distinct.

- List item 1
- List item 2
  - Nested item
- List item 3

End of test.
excerpt: A comprehensive test of the new rich content rendering capabilities including Mermaid diagrams, LaTeX math, and optimized layout.
